data.title: Pakistan Integrates Bitcoin into Economic Infrastructure
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Pakistan's cryptocurrency regulatory body has announced plans to incorporate Bitcoin into the country's economic infrastructure. The initiative aims to utilize the nation's 20 GW energy surplus for Bitcoin mining and artificial intelligence-related ventures. The regulatory body also anticipates that emerging markets will spearhead the next wave of cryptocurrency adoption.

Previously, there were reports that a Pakistani Minister of State proposed the idea of adopting Bitcoin as a national reserve.

data.title: OCC green lights Ripple, BitGo, Paxos national trust bank charter applications
data.description:
The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has announced conditional approvals for five national trust bank charter applications from cryptocurrency-related firms, Ripple, BitGo, and Paxos, alongside Circle and Fidelity Digital Assets. All five companies are responsible for issuing stablecoins. However, Fidelity is yet to issue its own stablecoin, still allegedly said to be […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/occ-ripple-bitgo-paxos-national-trust/

data.title: Crypto’s Tether launches public offer to buy Italian soccer club Juventus
data.description:
USDT issuer Tether on Friday announced that it has submitted a binding, all-cash proposal to acquire majority (65. 4%) of Italian soccer club Juventus Football Club, via Exor, the holding company that owns the club. This transaction is reportedly fully backed by Tether’s own capital, will depend on regulatory approvals and Exor’s acceptance. In a press […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-offers-to-buy-soccer-club-juventus/

data.title: Tokenization benefits ‘light at first,’ but will expand if democratized: NYDIG
data.description:
Regulations must evolve for tokenized real-world assets to be better integrated with DeFi, so their immediate benefit won’t be significant, says NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/tokenization-benefits-light-at-first-but-will-increase-if-democratized-nydig?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto Exchange Trading Activity Slumps As Spot Volumes Fall Sharply In 2025
data.description:
Spot trading activity across major crypto exchanges has declined significantly in 2025, according to data shared by Kaiko. The chart shows that aggregate spot trading volumes are now down 66% since January, marking one of the sharpest contractions in exchange activity this year.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/crypto-exchange-trading-activity-slumps-as-spot-volumes-fall-sharply-in-2025/

data.title: Peter Schiff Sees A Dangerous Message In Silver And Treasuries
data.description:
Silver prices have surged to record territory, drawing renewed attention to precious metals as U. S. bond yields continue climbing. According to Peter Schiff, silver is now trading at an all-time high, while gold has risen more than $70 and sits less than $30 away from setting a new record
source: https://www.ethnews.com/peter-schiff-sees-a-dangerous-message-in-silver-and-treasuries/

data.title: SOL struggles as Solana TVL slides and memecoin demand fades
data.description:
SOL demand cools as its total value locked drops by $10 billion and memecoin trading slumps. Traders’ lack of appetite for long leverage could further complicate the situation.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sol-struggles-as-solana-tvl-slides-memecoin-demand-fades?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Coinbase teams up with Standard Chartered to scale institutional crypto access
data.description:
Coinbase and Standard Chartered have expanded their partnership to develop a broader range of crypto services, targeting institutional clients and focusing on regulated access to digital asset markets. The collaboration centers on building trading, custody, staking, and lending capabilities designed to meet institutional requirements for security, compliance, and settlement efficiency. The partnership brings together Coinbase, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-teams-up-with-standard-chartered/
